title: ESG Sustainability Data Extraction Schema
description: Defines all fields the LLM extraction pipeline should extract from sustainability/ESG reports. Designed to be framework-agnostic (covers GRI, TCFD, CSRD/ESRS, SASB, CDP, ISSB) while mapping each KPI back to its source framework(s). This schema is the contract between the PDF parser (Phase 2) and the LLM extractor (Phase 3).

report_metadata.description: Identifies the report itself — who, when, what framework

company_name.description: Legal or trading name of the reporting entity

company_aliases.description: Other names, ticker symbols, parent company

industry_sector.description: Industry sector (e.g., Energy, Financial Services, Manufacturing)

report_title.description: Full title of the published report

frameworks_used.description: Reporting frameworks/standards the report claims alignment with

assurance_level.description: Level of external assurance on ESG data

currency.description: Currency used for financial figures (ISO 4217, e.g., USD, EUR)

revenue_unit.description: Unit for revenue (e.g., million USD, billion EUR)

employee_count.description: Total headcount at reporting year end

scope_3_categories_covered.description: Which Scope 3 categories (1-15 per GHG Protocol) the report covers

environmental.description: All environmental KPIs — emissions, energy, water, waste, biodiversity

ghg_emissions.description: Greenhouse gas emissions (GRI 305, ESRS E1, IFRS S2, CDP, GHG Protocol)

scope_1.description: Direct GHG emissions from owned/controlled sources

by_gas.description: Breakdown by gas type (CO2, CH4, N2O, HFCs, etc.)

scope_2.description: Indirect GHG emissions from purchased energy

methodology.description: Whether location-based or market-based approach was used

scope_3.description: Other indirect GHG emissions across the value chain

emission_intensity.description: Emissions per unit of revenue or production

denominator.description: What the intensity is divided by

sbti_validated.description: Validated by Science Based Targets initiative

methodology_notes.description: GHG accounting methodology, emission factors used

energy.description: Energy consumption and mix (GRI 302, ESRS E1)

fuel_consumption.description: Fuel consumption from non-renewable and renewable sources

by_type.description: Breakdown by fuel type (diesel, gasoline/petrol, LPG, natural gas, etc.)

type.description: e.g., diesel, gasoline, petrol, LPG, natural gas, propane

electricity_consumption.description: Electricity, heating, cooling, and steam consumption

type.description: e.g., grid, steam, heat, captive, solar, wind

renewable_share_pct.description: Percentage of energy from renewable sources

water.description: Water withdrawal, consumption, discharge (GRI 303, ESRS E3, CDP Water)

water_intensity.description: Water consumption per unit of activity

denominator.description: What the intensity is divided by

waste.description: Waste generation and management (GRI 306, ESRS E5)

waste_type.description: e.g., organic, plastic, paper, glass, metal, e-waste

air_emissions.description: Non-GHG air pollutant emissions (GRI 305-7, ESRS E2)

type.description: e.g., NOx, SOx, VOC, particulate_matter, CO, H2S, ozone_depleting_substances

biodiversity.description: Biodiversity and land use (GRI 304, ESRS E4, TNFD)

physical_risks.description: Description of physical climate risks identified

transition_risks.description: Description of transition risks (policy, tech, market)

scenario_analysis.description: Whether climate scenario analysis was conducted

social.description: All social KPIs — workforce, health & safety, human rights, community

local_employees_pct.description: Percentage of local employees out of total skilled employees

diversity_inclusion.description: Diversity and equal opportunity (GRI 405, ESRS S1)

age_distribution.description: Workforce age distribution narrative or breakdown

health_safety.description: Occupational health and safety (GRI 403, ESRS S1)

ltifr.description: Lost Time Injury Frequency Rate (per million hours worked)

lost_days.description: Total lost workdays due to injuries

other_occupational_injuries.description: Recordable injuries excluding fatalities and high-consequence

total_training_hours.description: Total training hours imparted across the workforce

training_hours_male.description: Total or average training hours for male employees

training_hours_female.description: Total or average training hours for female employees

parental_leave.description: Parental leave data by gender (GRI 401-3, ESRS S1)

total_reviewed_pct.description: % of employees receiving regular performance reviews

human_rights.description: Human rights due diligence (GRI 408/409/411, ESRS S1/S2, CSDDD)

whistleblowing.description: Whistleblowing / ethics hotline data (GRI 2-26, ESRS G1)

supply_chain.description: Supply chain social responsibility (GRI 308/414, ESRS S2)

suppliers_screened_pct.description: % of suppliers screened on social criteria

governance.description: Governance KPIs — board, ethics, risk management

board_composition.description: Board structure and diversity (GRI 405, ESRS G1)

esg_compensation_details.description: Description of ESG-linked KPIs for executive pay

ethics_compliance.description: Anti-corruption and business ethics (GRI 205/206, ESRS G1)

ethics_training_employees.description: Number of employees who completed ethics/integrity training

supply_chain.description: Supply chain sustainability metrics — procurement practices, local sourcing, sustainable packaging (GRI 204, 308, 414)

local_spend_pct.description: % of total procurement spend on local suppliers

local_suppliers_pct.description: % of local suppliers out of total suppliers

sustainable_packaging_spend_pct.description: % of packaging spend on sustainable materials

certified_materials_pct.description: % of materials that are certified sustainable

suppliers_screened_pct.description: % of suppliers screened on ESG criteria

supplier_code_adherence_pct.description: % of suppliers adhering to code of conduct

extraction_metadata.description: Metadata about how the data was extracted (for audit trail)

metric_value.description: A quantitative metric with value, unit, and optional year-over-year data

unit.description: Unit of measurement (e.g., tCO2e, MWh, ML, tonnes, %)

page_reference.description: Page in source PDF where value was found

notes.description: Any caveats, methodology notes, or boundary info
